subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the divine Lote-Tree! Years and months have passed away, nay, ages and epochs have elapsed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الکریم من السدره الرحمانیه قد قضت سنون و شهور بل مضت احقاب و دهور
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for martyrs, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
